source: Kinmo PW UNI-T Distributor Price List (PDF)

categories.name: Digital Multimeters
categories.description: Handheld, palm, pocket, pen, smart, industrial, datalogging, and bench digital multimeters covering every test workflow.

products.description: Tough True RMS field multimeter for electricians working around VFDs and motor drives. The entry point into the MAX series for daily industrial troubleshooting.
True RMS multimeter built for HVAC techs and industrial electricians who need temperature measurement plus VFD-safe voltage testing in one rugged unit.
Top-tier MAX series True RMS multimeter with 12V LED test for automotive and lighting techs who also handle VFDs and temperature jobs.
Entry-level automotive multimeter for shop mechanics doing basic ignition and dwell angle work on 4/6/8 cylinder engines.
Automotive multimeter that adds temperature probe to the UT105 — useful for diagnosing overheating components alongside dwell and tach checks.
Upgraded automotive meter with VFC filter for hybrid and EV inverter work — handles RPM, dwell, and high-frequency signals the original UT105 can't touch.
Top-spec automotive meter with built-in 12V battery test — the one to grab if you also do alternator and starter diagnostics, not just engine timing.
Pocket multimeter with surprisingly wide temperature range for service techs doing quick refrigeration or HVAC checks on the go.
Pocket multimeter that adds capacitance to the UT120A — handy for technicians checking start caps on small motors and appliances.
Top of the UT120 pocket family — adds 400mA current measurement so you don't need a second meter for low-current control circuits.
Slim pocket multimeter for service callouts where a full DMM is overkill. Strips out temperature for a slightly lower price than the UT120C.
Dual-display smart multimeter with NCV and LIVE detection — built for residential electricians who want to see voltage and frequency at the same time.
Smart dual-display DMM with capacitance and temperature, built for electricians who want one meter that handles motor caps, thermistors, and panel checks.
Step up from the UT121B with bigger capacitance range — for electricians regularly testing larger motor run capacitors and PFC banks.
Simple residential multimeter for home wiring, outlet checks, and basic continuity testing. Friendly for apprentices and DIY homeowners.
Same residential workhorse as the UT123 in updated trim — basic AC/DC voltage, continuity, and NCV for everyday house calls.
Pocket-sized smart multimeter for quick checks on the go. Slips into a tool pouch without sacrificing 4000-count resolution or capacitance testing.
60,000-count Bluetooth multimeter with LoZ and LPF for chasing ghost voltages and VFD circuits. The smart pick if you log readings to your phone in the field.
Pen-style multimeter for one-handed continuity and voltage checks in tight panels and junction boxes. Fits in a shirt pocket like a marker.
True RMS pen multimeter with duty cycle and big capacitance range — basically a full DMM stuffed into a pen body for techs working in cramped spots.
Auto-ranging palm multimeter for students, hobbyists, and apprentices learning the trade. The easy-button version of the UT33 family.
Manual-range palm multimeter — the cheapest UT33 for techs who prefer dialing in ranges themselves and don't need fancy extras.
Manual-range palm DMM with K-type temperature input — the budget pick for HVAC and appliance repair students.
Palm DMM with NCV for residential electricians who want a cheap second meter that beeps when wires are live.
Compact 250V auto-ranging palm meter — sized for residential 230V work, not industrial. Great as a starter meter for new electricians.
Manual-range 250V palm DMM — bare-bones option for hobby electronics, learning labs, and basic home wiring checks.
UT131 with K-type temperature input — appliance and small-engine techs get a basic palm meter that doubles as a thermometer.
Palm DMM with NCV — pick this if you want the cheapest UT131 with non-contact live wire detection for residential work.
Auto-ranging handheld with frequency and temperature — solid all-rounder for electricians and HVAC techs who want one meter for daily field work.
Manual-range handheld DMM — strips the temperature and auto-ranging from the UT133A for techs who want simpler, cheaper, and faster.
1000V auto-ranging handheld for industrial electricians who need wide frequency measurement for VFDs and motor drives.
Manual-range version of the UT136B+ with added temperature input — for techs who want full control plus thermocouple support at 1000V.
Long-running 20A handheld with temperature — a no-nonsense workhorse that's been on Filipino electrician benches for years.
Refresh of the classic UT39 with bigger resistance range — the entry handheld for general electrical work without temp or frequency.
Updated UT39C with frequency support added — for electricians who want the familiar UT39 layout plus VFD-friendly Hz measurement.
Top of the UT39+ family — 20A current, 200MΩ resistance, and full frequency and temperature for industrial maintenance teams.
Entry True RMS multimeter — the cheapest way into accurate readings on non-sinusoidal waveforms from drives and electronics.
True RMS multimeter with bigger capacitance and frequency than the UT139A — the right step up for techs who need motor cap and Hz readings.
Affordable True RMS multimeter for electricians who need real measurements without lab-grade pricing. The right balance of features for daily field work.
Top of the UT139 family — same temperature and capacitance as the UT139C with refined True RMS performance for serious field techs.
Classic universal DMM — basic AC/DC voltage and current at 1000V. Cheap, simple, and proven for general electrical work.
Step-up from the UT51 with 20A current and capacitance — for techs who occasionally measure motor caps but don't need temp.
UT52 with K-type temperature added — the budget pick for techs who want a basic 20A meter that handles thermocouples too.
Top of the UT5x universal series with frequency added — covers basic V/A/R/C/F/Temp on a single dial for general-purpose work.
Larger-display universal DMM — easier to read in dim Philippine basements and electrical rooms than the UT5x series.
UT58A with K-type temperature input — for techs who want the bigger display plus thermocouple readings on appliances and motors.
UT58 with frequency added on top of temperature — full general-purpose meter for techs juggling motors, drives, and HVAC work.
Mid-range UT58 — same big display as the UT58A but cheaper, without the higher resistance range. Good general-use meter for shop electricians.
Top-spec UT58 with full feature set — high resistance, frequency, and temperature on a single dial for techs who want one meter for everything.
Affordable 600V universal DMM — sized right for residential and small-commercial electricians who don't need 1000V capability.
UT151 with K-type temperature added — for residential and HVAC techs who don't need 1000V but want thermocouple support.
Updated UT60 family standard meter — solid all-around DMM with full V/A/R/C/F/Temp coverage at a fair price.
EU-market variant of the UT60S — same feature set, sold under the UT60 EU model code for European distribution channels.
UT60 with Bluetooth — log readings to the iENV app for techs creating service reports straight from the panel without writing them down.
Refreshed UT61B for general electrical work — auto-ranging without temperature, cheaper than the UT61D+ but still 1000V capable.
UT61 with 20A current and temperature — popular Filipino electrician pick when you need higher current capacity than the UT61B+.
22000-count UT61 — high-resolution meter for electronics technicians and lab work who need 220MHz frequency and big capacitance ranges.
Mid-range standard DMM with full feature coverage — sits between the UT139 and UT181 for techs who want one all-purpose meter.
UT161 with 20A current and temperature — the practical pick for industrial maintenance teams who need a step up from the UT161B.
22000-count UT161 for advanced electronics work — same high-resolution upgrade as the UT61E+ in the newer chassis.
Entry of the UT71 intelligent series — 20,000-count DMM with 200MHz frequency, built for electronics labs and R&D benches.
UT71A with temperature, 4-20mA loop percentage, and onboard storage — for instrumentation techs commissioning industrial process loops.
40,000-count UT71 — bigger ranges and faster frequency response than the UT71B for serious electronics and lab measurements.
UT71C with deep 9999-set storage for unattended logging — pick this if you want to walk away and let the meter record overnight.
Top of the UT71 family — adds 2500W power measurement to the 40K-count platform for energy auditors and load testing in the field.
Industrial True RMS DMM built for plant maintenance — rugged enough for daily abuse with full feature set for motor and drive work.
UT171C trim of the industrial True RMS line — same platform as the UT171B with calibration tweaks for higher-accuracy plant work.
Premium 60,000-count datalogging multimeter for advanced troubleshooting and field reporting. Color screen plus Bluetooth/USB makes it the go-to for industrial maintenance teams.
Pro-grade 600V multimeter with 20A current — built tougher than the UT139 for electricians on heavy commercial sites.
UT191E with K-type temperature added — the top choice in the UT191 line for HVAC and motor maintenance work.
Pro-Line True RMS DMM — 1000V capable workhorse for industrial maintenance teams who don't need temp or datalogging.
Mid-range Pro-Line with temperature and 40MHz bandwidth — the all-around pick for techs servicing VFDs, motors, and sensors.
Top Pro-Line model with datalogging and dual-source measurement — for industrial techs documenting commissioning and troubleshooting work.
1700V solar-rated multimeter for PV installers working on residential and small commercial solar arrays in the Philippines.
Bulletproof industrial DMM — IP67, 5m drop rated, 12kV pulse protection, and Bluetooth datalogging. Built for the worst plant and field conditions.
Solar version of the UT197 with 2500V DC capability — purpose-built for utility-scale PV installers and string voltage testing.
Heavy-duty 20A standard DMM — popular Filipino electrician choice for high-current measurements without stepping up to a clamp meter.
UT89X without the temperature input — slightly cheaper for techs who don't use thermocouples and want the same 20A handling.
Top of the UT89X family with bigger ranges and 60MHz frequency — built for techs who want one meter for both heavy current and electronics work.
Compact 20A standard DMM — simple feature set and reliable build, a long-time favorite at Filipino hardware stores.
UT890C variant without temperature — same compact build at a slightly lower price for techs who skip thermocouple work.
Specialized 2000V multimeter for solar string testing and HV electronics — handles voltages most general meters can't safely touch.
Multimeter and 1000V insulation tester in one — for electricians who occasionally check insulation but don't want to carry a separate megger.

categories.name: Clamp Meters
categories.description: AC and AC/DC clamp meters from mini 200A pocket models to 2500A True RMS industrial clamps, plus fork and leakage variants.

products.description: Cheapest UT200 clamp — AC-only 200A for residential electricians doing basic load checks on single-phase circuits.
Updated UT200A doubled to 400A — the cheap entry into AC clamp meters for techs who outgrew 200A on small commercial loads.
600A AC clamp with capacitance — bumps up jaw capacity for techs working on 3-phase commercial panels.
400A AC clamp with bigger 40MΩ resistance range — the right step up from the UT200 line for general electrical service work.
Regional variant of the UT201+ — same specs, sold under the UT201R model code in select markets.
UT201+ with capacitance and temperature added — a popular general-use AC clamp for HVAC and electrician routine work.
600A AC clamp with full feature set including frequency — for techs who handle motor drives and need Hz readings without a separate meter.
Same as the UT202A+ in a slightly different chassis — pick whichever your distributor stocks for general 600A AC work.
Regional variant of the UT202+ — same 400A specs and capacitance/temp combo, sold under the UT202R label.
Smart 600A AC clamp with auto-mode switching — points the clamp at the wire and figures out V or A on its own. Beginner-friendly.
AC/DC smart clamp with Bluetooth — log readings to the iENV app for techs who report measurements straight from the panel to phone.
Cheapest AC/DC 400A clamp — opens the door to DC measurements for solar, battery, and automotive techs.
Regional variant of the UT203+ — same AC/DC 400A specs, sold under the UT203R model code in select markets.
AC/DC 600A clamp with temperature — the workhorse mid-tier clamp for HVAC, solar, and automotive techs in one tool.
Regional variant of the UT204+ — same AC/DC 600A platform with capacitance and temp, sold under the UT204R label.
Original 1000A AC clamp — entry into the high-current bracket for techs working bigger 3-phase motor circuits.
1000A AC clamp with 42mm jaw — fits standard service entry conductors for industrial maintenance teams on heavy circuits.
Same 1000A platform as UT205A+ with bigger 55mm jaw — pick this when you need to clamp around fat busbars or bundled conductors.
Refreshed 1000A AC clamp with bigger resistance and capacitance ranges — the modernized pick over the older UT205A+.
1000A AC clamp with temperature input — the practical heavy-duty meter for HVAC techs servicing big chillers and rooftop units.
Variant of the UT206A+ with 1MHz frequency cap — same heavy-duty 1000A platform at a slightly different price point.
AC/DC 1000A clamp without temperature — the budget pick for solar and battery techs needing both DC and AC at high current.
AC/DC 1000A clamp with temperature added — the full-featured choice for industrial techs who need DC current plus thermocouple work.
Bare-bones mini AC clamp — current-only at 200A, the cheapest way to confirm load on residential branch circuits.
Mini AC clamp with NCV and MAX/MIN — slightly more useful than the UT210A for inrush capture and live wire detection.
Mini clamp with full DMM functions plus temperature — the compact AC clamp for HVAC techs measuring single-phase loads in tight panels.
Top of the UT210 mini clamp family — adds DC current and frequency for solar techs and motor drive troubleshooting.
Compact AC/DC clamp for tight panels where a full-size jaw won't fit. Ideal for residential electrical work and HVAC techs measuring single-phase loads.
High-precision low-current clamp for electronics labs and instrumentation — measures down to mA range with accuracy a 600A clamp can't touch.
Mid-size 400A AC clamp — full DMM functions in a compact body for everyday electrician work without going overboard on jaw size.
True RMS 400A clamp with temperature — accurate readings on distorted waveforms from inverters and electronic loads.
Top of the UT213 family — adds DC current to the True RMS platform for solar, EV, and battery backup techs.
Entry 600A AC clamp from the UT216 family — basic V/A/R/C without temperature for general electrical service work.
True RMS 600A AC clamp — accurate on VFD outputs and distorted commercial loads where average-responding meters lie.
Advanced 600A clamp with inrush current capture and temperature probe — built for electricians diagnosing motor starts and HVAC compressor faults.
Top of the UT216 family with OLED display — easier to read in dark electrical rooms, plus True RMS for clean readings on dirty loads.
Pro-Line True RMS 600A clamp with IP54 rating — built for outdoor service and rough industrial environments where dust and water are real.
Mid Pro-Line clamp with temperature and 40MHz bandwidth — for industrial techs needing thermocouple support plus high-frequency readings.
Top Pro-Line clamp with AC/DC current — the full IP54-rated kit for solar installers and industrial maintenance teams in the field.
Power and harmonics clamp for energy auditors — measures single and 3-phase kW with USB logging for documenting plant power quality jobs.
Solar-rated pro clamp handling 1500V AC and 2500V DC plus flex sensor input — the all-in-one for utility-scale PV commissioning.
2000A AC clamp — for industrial maintenance teams measuring service entrances, large generators, and main switchgear.
AC/DC 2000A clamp — adds DC measurement to the UT220 platform for solar farms and large battery system installations.
Top of the high-current line at 2500A AC/DC True RMS — for utility crews and heavy industrial techs working on the biggest service mains.
1000A AC clamp with 33mm jaw — sub-brand variant for techs who want a slim 1000A jaw at a lower price than the UT205 family.
Open-fork meter with 60A AC/DC range — slips onto live wires without disconnecting, perfect for quick load checks in cramped boxes.
Fork meter with full DMM functions and 200A AC range — for residential electricians who want one tool for both panel and outlet work.
AC/DC 200A fork meter — adds DC measurement to the UT256A platform for techs working on solar, EV, and battery circuits.
Leakage current clamp for chasing nuisance trips on RCD/RCBO devices — the entry tool for electricians diagnosing earth leakage problems.
Leakage clamp with 600A range — for industrial techs who also need normal current measurement, not just earth leakage diagnosis.
Bluetooth leakage clamp with 20-order harmonic analysis — for power quality auditors investigating intermittent RCD trips with phone-based reports.
Big 80mm-jaw leakage clamp — wraps around busbars and bundled cables that smaller leakage meters can't fit, for industrial substation work.
AC/DC leakage clamp with tiny 7mm jaw — squeezes into PCB and wiring harness gaps where standard leakage clamps can't reach.

categories.name: Thermal Imagers
categories.description: Smartphone, handheld, heavy-duty, enhanced, pro, and monocular thermal imagers for predictive maintenance, building diagnostics, and inspection.

products.description: Handheld 256×192 thermal camera tuned for body-temperature screening at clinics, schools, and building entrances. Tight 30-45°C range gives the accuracy general-purpose imagers lack.
Plug-into-Android thermal camera for HVAC and electrical spot checks. The cheapest way into thermal imaging — no extra screen, just clip it to your phone.
iPhone-compatible thermal camera for service techs already running iOS field apps. Lightning-port version of the popular UTi120Mobile.
256×192 Android thermal module with sharper resolution than the UTi120 series. The right pick for finding hidden water damage and insulation gaps in PH homes.
Android thermal module that adds 550°C high-temp range and EST screening mode. One device for both industrial hot-spots and body-temp checks.
Android thermal module with manual-focus 4.3mm lens for sharper detail at distance. For inspectors needing to image PCB-level components or distant switchgear.
Top-tier 400×300 Android thermal module with 9.5mm telephoto lens. For utility crews shooting overhead lines and substations from safe distance.
Dual Android+iOS version of the UTi740M. The pick if your team mixes phone platforms but wants one shared thermal module.
Pocket standalone thermal camera — no phone needed. The point-and-shoot starter for electricians wanting their first thermal tool.
Compact portable thermal camera with 3.5-inch touchscreen for easier on-screen analysis. Step up from the UTi120P when you want full UI controls.
Touchscreen 256×192 portable thermal with 550°C high-end. The pick when you need both detail and the ability to image hot motors and breaker panels.
Specialized 1000°C high-temp thermal for foundries, kilns, and metalwork shops. Lower pixel count, but the only model that handles industrial furnace temps.
Heavy-duty 120×90 thermal built to survive plant-floor abuse. Entry into the rugged S-series for facility maintenance teams.
Step-up 160×120 thermal with 2MP visible camera for IR/visible blending. The right tool for clear inspection reports without WiFi overhead.
IP65 rugged thermal with WiFi transfer and super-resolution to 320×240. The mid-range pick for outdoor utility and substation inspection.
Standalone 120×90 thermal with 2.8-inch screen — classic point-and-shoot rig for HVAC and electrical service calls.
256×192 thermal with 400°C ceiling — sweet spot for residential and small-commercial electrical work where 550°C isn't needed.
Workhorse 256×192 thermal camera for HVAC and electrical inspection. The most-recommended UNI-T thermal for daily field maintenance work.
IP65 rugged 256×192 thermal with super-resolution to 512×384 and WiFi report transfer. The pro pick when reports go straight to the client.
Enhanced 256×192 thermal with 3.5-inch IPS screen and WiFi for sharper UI and easier on-camera review. Bigger display than the UTi720B.
320×240 enhanced thermal with WiFi — the resolution upgrade for predictive maintenance teams who need to spot smaller defects.
Pro 256×192 thermal with laser rangefinder, 5MP camera, and video recording. For inspectors building full-detail reports with measurement and walk-through clips.
Pro 320×240 thermal with -40°C low-end for cold-storage and refrigeration inspection. Laser ranging and 5MP camera built in.
High-res 384×288 thermal with manual focus and 4.3-inch screen. Steps up image clarity for predictive maintenance on motors, transformers, and switchgear.
256×192 telephoto thermal with manual focus and 28°x20° field for distant targets. Bluetooth and WiFi push reports straight to phone.
Pro 384×288 wide-angle thermal with WiFi, Bluetooth, and video recording. The pick when you need both detail and a wider field of view.
Top-of-line 384×288 thermal with auto-focus, IP54 rugged build, 2m drop spec, and laser distance. The flagship for professional thermography services.
640×480 high-resolution thermal flagship for utility-grade inspection. The detail level lets you spot single-cell PV faults and hair-fine wiring hot spots.
Top-tier 640×512 thermal with 1200°C high-end and <35mK sensitivity. The professional choice for serious thermography, industrial audits, and substation surveys.
Compact thermal monocular for outdoor security, hunting, and night observation. Focus-free design with WiFi streaming — point and watch.
384×288 thermal monocular with 13mm lens for medium-range outdoor observation. Laser pointer helps mark targets for the spotter.
384×288 thermal monocular with 18mm lens for longer-range outdoor scouting. Tighter field of view than the UTx313.
384×288 thermal monocular with 25mm telephoto for long-range observation. The longest reach in the standard UTx3xx family.
Upgraded 400×300 thermal monocular with 25mK sensitivity and onboard photo/video. The M-series step up over the standard UTx313.
400×300 thermal monocular with 18mm lens — mid-range reach with M-series sensitivity. The everyday choice for night patrols and wildlife observation.
400×300 thermal monocular with 25mm telephoto — longest standard reach with photo/video and WiFi. For perimeter and long-range scouting.
400×300 thermal monocular with 1000m laser rangefinder built in. The MR-series adds distance measurement for tactical and surveying use.
400×300 thermal monocular with 18mm lens and 1000m laser rangefinder. Mid-reach scope for outdoor security and wildlife teams who need range data.
400×300 thermal monocular with 25mm telephoto and 1000m laser ranging. Long reach plus distance — for serious outdoor and tactical applications.
640×512 high-res thermal monocular with 25mm lens. The flagship for spotting fine detail at distance — security pros and naturalists.
640×512 thermal monocular with 35mm telephoto — top of the standard UTx line for long-range professional observation.

Pro-grade Android smartphone thermal camera module with 256x192 IR resolution and dual measurement modes for both elevated body temperature and industrial inspection. Plugs into Type-C, ships with a 1m extension cable.
Compact handheld thermal camera aimed at HVAC, electrical, and DIY troubleshooting. IP65 rated with 2 m drop durability, 5 color palettes, and on-board 16 GB microSD storage.

Tripod-mountable thermal camera dedicated to elevated body temperature (EBT) screening at 30 to 45 degC with +/-0.5 degC accuracy. Real-time PC software streaming with auto high-temp alarm makes it suitable for clinic, school, and entrance screening.

categories.name: Laser Distance Meters
categories.description: Pocket laser distance meters from 40m to 120m, with USB-C charging and laser-plus-tape combo formats.

products.description: Pocket 50m laser distance meter for residential renovation, room sizing, and interior contractors. Front and rear reference makes corner measurement easy.
70m laser distance meter for mid-size warehouse, retail, and commercial site work. Step up from the LM50A when 50m runs short.
100m laser distance meter — the daily driver for surveyors, contractors, and warehouse layout teams measuring full-building spans.
120m laser distance meter for commercial and industrial site surveying. The longest reach in the LM-A series.
40m laser distance meter with USB-C rechargeable Li-ion battery. No more dead AAA mid-job — the modern pick for daily indoor work.
60m USB-C rechargeable laser distance meter — extra reach over the LM40Mi. The renovation contractor's everyday tool.
40m laser distance meter with built-in 5m steel tape. Two tools in one — for finish carpenters who switch between long and short measurements all day.
60m laser plus 5m tape combo — extra laser reach over the LM40T. The clean-pocket choice for trim, cabinet, and renovation crews.
Pocket 40m laser meter with length/area/volume modes. The cheapest entry into laser distance measurement for DIY and small jobs.
Pocket 50m laser distance meter — the basic, reliable size for residential and commercial interior measurement.
Pocket 60m laser distance meter for general interior and small commercial site work. Mid-range pick when 50m won't cover full warehouse spans.
80m laser distance meter for surveyors and contractors needing more reach than pocket sizes give. Solid mid-tier pick.
100m laser distance meter for full-building surveys and site work. The most popular size for general construction.
120m laser distance meter for warehouse, logistics, and outdoor commercial work. Step up from the LM100 when reach is a daily issue.
150m laser distance meter — top reach in the standard LM line. For outdoor surveying, plant layout, and large facility audits.
Industrial-grade 40m laser distance meter with Pythagoras mode. Built for factory layout, machine alignment, and metrology-critical work.
Industrial 50m laser distance meter for plant maintenance and metal fabrication shops. Ruggedized version of the LM50 with ±2mm precision.
Industrial 120m laser meter with auto-leveling for sloped and uneven sites. The pick for surveying teams working hilly terrain.
Industrial 150m laser distance meter with auto-leveling — flagship of the I-series. For utility, plant, and large infrastructure work.
40m pocket laser meter with bigger 1.8-inch LCD for easier reading at arm's length. The e-series upgrade — better screen, same compact size.
50m pocket laser meter with 1.8-inch LCD — the most popular e-series size. Daily measure tool for renovators and contractors.
60m pocket laser meter with 1.8-inch LCD — top of the e-series. The reach-and-readability sweet spot for commercial site teams.

categories.name: Infrared Thermometers
categories.description: Single, circle, and dual-laser non-contact infrared thermometers covering -50°C to 2200°C for industrial and HVAC use.

products.description: Entry-level IR thermometer for HVAC, food service, and home DIY checks up to 400°C. The cheapest way to add non-contact temperature to your toolkit.
General-purpose IR thermometer with single laser pointer and adjustable emissivity. The bench-and-field workhorse for HVAC and electrical techs.
Wider-range IR thermometer covering -50°C to 500°C — handles cold-storage and small industrial heat checks in one tool.
UT306S with circle laser instead of single dot — shows the actual measurement area, eliminating guesswork on exactly what you're reading.
Mini palm-sized IR thermometer — the pocket pick for kitchen, refrigeration, and quick spot checks. Lightweight, fixed emissivity, point-and-shoot simple.
Solid mid-range IR gun for HVAC techs and electricians. Single-laser version with adjustable emissivity for varied surface materials.
All-purpose IR thermometer for HVAC and electrical hot-spot detection up to 600°C. Circle laser shows the actual measurement area, not a confusing single dot.
Dual-laser IR thermometer that brackets the spot size — easier than circle laser for spotting at distance. Top of the UT301+ series.
20:1 IR thermometer for measuring at distance — useful when targets are behind guards or at height. Single laser, up to 700°C.
Mid-temp industrial IR thermometer up to 1100°C with circle laser. For boiler, kiln, and hot-process work where 600°C isn't enough.
Dual-laser version of the UT302C+ — clearer spot bracketing for long-distance shots up to 1100°C. The pick when accuracy of aim matters at range.
Long-range 30:1 IR thermometer up to 800°C — for measuring overhead lines, conveyor bearings, and inaccessible motors from safe distance.
High-temp 30:1 IR thermometer to 1300°C with circle laser. For furnace, smelting, and heat-treatment shops needing both reach and clear targeting.
Dual-laser high-temp version of the UT303C+ to 1300°C. Cleaner spot bracketing for furnace and metalwork measurement at distance.
Long-distance industrial IR thermometer up to 2000°C with 50:1 optics. For metalwork, foundries, and high-temp industrial process monitoring.
55:1 ratio IR thermometer to 1850°C with 999-reading storage. The data-logging upgrade for industrial QA teams tracking process temperatures.
Top-of-line IR thermometer up to 2200°C — the highest range UNI-T offers. For molten-metal foundries and the most extreme industrial heat work.
IP65-rated IR thermometer for outdoor and dirty industrial use up to 450°C. The pick when your workspace gets rained on or dusty.
IP65 dual-laser IR thermometer to 650°C — outdoor-rugged with bracketed targeting for plant-floor measurement on rainy days.
IP65-rated pro IR thermometer for outdoor industrial use up to 850°C. The one to take into the rain or dusty plant floors.

categories.name: Insulation Testers
categories.description: Standard, fast, PV, and high-voltage megohm insulation testers up to 12kV / 10TΩ with PI/DAR analysis.

products.description: Entry-level 1000V insulation tester for verifying motor windings, transformers, and cable runs. The simplest pass/fail megger in the line.
1000V insulation tester with PI/DAR ratios for serious diagnostic work — not just pass/fail. The next step up from the UT501A.
Fast-mode 10/sec insulation tester for production line and panel manufacturers — auto-discharge and compare mode speed up repetitive QC checks.
2500V insulation tester for medium-voltage motors and transformers — the right step up when 1000V isn't enough to stress the insulation.
Handheld 1000V insulation tester with bigger 20GΩ range than the UT501 — the step up for techs needing more headroom on long cable runs.
Handheld insulation + general multimeter combo. Two instruments in one for electricians who need IR testing without carrying a separate megger.
1000V insulation tester with onboard storage for compliance jobs — log readings on-device without paper logs or a phone connection.
2500V insulation tester with USB output — for industrial maintenance teams documenting megger readings into PC reports for plant audits.
Multi-voltage 2500V tester with 1TΩ ceiling — covers 250V to 2500V test ranges with 999-set memory for repetitive plant audits.
Higher-resolution UT512D — 2.5TΩ ceiling at 2500V plus capacitance test, for advanced cable diagnostics and long-feeder testing.
5000V insulation tester for high-voltage motors, generators, and substation equipment — basic entry into the 5kV megger category.
5000V tester with 2TΩ range and onboard storage — for substation crews who need PI/DAR analysis and 999-test recall in the field.
Top of the UT513 line with Bluetooth, 5TΩ range, and capacitance — for HV crews who report megger results straight from the field to phone.
10kV insulation tester with 10TΩ ceiling — for utility and substation engineers testing transmission cables and switchgear at full HV stress levels.
12kV megger — top of the UNI-T insulation line, for utility crews testing the highest-voltage transmission and substation gear in the country.
PV-specific insulation tester for solar installers — IP54 outdoor-rated with auto-discharge and live circuit alarms for safe array commissioning.

categories.name: Laser Rangefinders
categories.description: Long-range laser rangefinders for hunting, golf, and surveying — 600 to 2000 yard/meter ranges with slope and angle modes.

products.description: Entry-level 600-yard laser rangefinder for hunting, archery, and recreational shooting. The cheapest way into long-range distance measurement.
1000-yard rangefinder with velocity measurement — the do-everything pick for hunters and outdoor sport. Step up from the LM600.
1500-yard rangefinder for long-range hunters and tactical shooters. The reach upgrade when 1000 yards isn't enough.
2000m laser rangefinder with USB-C and data export. For surveying and long-range observation when 1000m isn't enough.
600m golf rangefinder with flagpole lock and slope correction — the entry pick for course play.
800m golf rangefinder for amateur and club players. The reach upgrade over the LM600G with same flagpole lock and slope features.
1000m golf rangefinder — the most popular size for serious club golfers. Reaches every pin on standard courses.
1200m golf rangefinder for tournament-class players who need max distance and slope correction in one device.
1500m golf rangefinder — top of the G-series with longest reach for serious tournament play and demanding course layouts.
600m pro rangefinder with external display, area/volume calculation, and slope. The do-everything model — golf, hunting, and surveying combined.
